0: "News covering global events, international relations, and geopolitical developments. Keywords: diplomacy, conflict, treaties, humanitarian aid, sovereignty. Examples: United Nations peacekeeping missions, refugee crises in war-torn regions, international trade agreements."
1: "News focused on athletic competitions, player performances, and sports events. Keywords: championships, leagues, athletes, scores, tournaments. Examples: analysis of the Super Bowl, coverage of the FIFA World Cup, updates on NBA playoffs."
2: "News focused on economic activities, corporate developments, and market trends. Keywords: investments, mergers, earnings, stocks, startups. Examples: quarterly earnings reports, acquisition announcements, venture capital funding rounds."
3: "News focused on advancements and developments in science and technology. Keywords: innovation, research, gadgets, artificial intelligence, biotechnology. Examples: breakthroughs in renewable energy, reviews of the latest smartphones, discoveries in genetic engineering."
